# Flexiwind

> Flexiwind is a Laravel-first UI component system built with Blade, Livewire, and Tailwind CSS v4. It follows a code-ownership model inspired by shadcn/ui — components are copied into your project and are fully yours to customize.

## Overview

- Components are Blade-based, Tailwind v4-styled, and optionally Livewire-powered
- Interactive components (accordion, modal, dropdown, etc.) use [Flexilla](https://flexilla-docs.vercel.app/) for JS behavior
- A semantic design token system drives all theming (colors, surfaces, borders, radii)
- The Flexi CLI (`unoforge/flexiwind-cli`) manages component installation and updates

## Requirements

- PHP ^8.2
- Laravel ^12
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Node.js + npm

## Quick Start

```bash
# Via CLI (recommended)
composer require --dev unoforge/flexiwind-cli
php artisan flexi:init
php artisan flexi:add flexiwind-base

# Via starter kit
laravel new project-name --using=uno-forge-hub/livewire-tail-starter-kit
```

## Flexi CLI

```bash
# Add one or more components
php artisan flexi:add button input modal

# Initialize in an existing project
php artisan flexi:init
```

## Design System

### Semantic Color Roles

| Token       | Purpose                                              |
|-------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| `primary`   | Main brand color — buttons, links, active states     |
| `secondary` | Supporting brand color for visual hierarchy          |
| `accent`    | Highlight color for badges and special interactions  |
| `info`      | Neutral/informational messages                       |
| `success`   | Positive states, confirmations, valid inputs         |
| `warning`   | Caution states requiring attention                   |
| `danger`    | Destructive actions, errors, critical states         |
| `gray`      | Neutral scale for backgrounds, borders, disabled     |

### Background Tokens

`--bg`, `--bg-subtle`, `--bg-surface`, `--bg-muted`, `--card`, `--card-gray`, `--popover`, `--popover-gray`, `--overlay`

### Foreground Tokens

`--fg`, `--fg-title`, `--fg-subtitle`, `--fg-muted`

### Border Tokens

`--border`, `--border-strong`, `--border-subtle`, `--border-card`, `--border-input`

### Radius

`--radius-ui` — default border radius for all components

### Button Variants & Intents

Variants: `solid`, `soft`, `outline`, `ghost`, `flexi`, `none`

Intents: `primary`, `secondary`, `accent`, `success`, `danger`, `warning`, `info`, `gray`, `neutral`, `white`

CSS class pattern: `btn-{variant}-{intent}` (e.g. `btn-solid-primary`, `btn-soft-danger`)

### UI Utilities

Variants: `solid`, `soft`, `subtle`, `outline`

CSS class pattern: `ui-{variant}-{intent}` (e.g. `ui-soft-primary`, `ui-subtle-danger`)

### Dark Mode

With Alpine/Livewire: use an Alpine store to toggle a `dark` class on `<html>`.
Without Alpine: install `@flexilla/utilities` and use its theme API.

## Components

### Actions & Inputs

- **Button** — `php artisan flexi:add button`
  Props: `variant` (solid|soft|outline|ghost|none), `intent`, `size` (xs|sm|md|lg|xl), `iconOnly`, `disabled`, `href`

- **Input** — `php artisan flexi:add input`
  Supports icons, validation states, leading/trailing addons via `x-ui.input.group`

- **Text Area** — `php artisan flexi:add textarea`
  Auto-resizes via `@flexilla/auto-resize-area`

- **Select** — `php artisan flexi:add select`

- **Checkbox** — `php artisan flexi:add checkbox`

- **Radio** — `php artisan flexi:add radio`

- **Switch** — `php artisan flexi:add switch`

- **OTP / Pin** — `php artisan flexi:add otp`
  Segmented input for verification codes; uses `@flexilla/pin-input`

- **Range** — `php artisan flexi:add range`
  Slider with custom indicator via `@flexilla/custom-range`

### Layout & Structure

- **Card** — `php artisan flexi:add card`
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.card.header`, `x-ui.card.title`, `x-ui.card.description`, `x-ui.card.content`, `x-ui.card.footer`

- **Divider** — `php artisan flexi:add divider`

- **Aspect Ratio** — `php artisan flexi:add aspect`

### Navigation

- **Navbar** — `php artisan flexi:add navbar`

- **Sidebar** — `php artisan flexi:add sidebar`

- **Breadcrumbs** — `php artisan flexi:add breadcrumbs`
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.breadcrumbs.item`, `x-ui.breadcrumbs.separator`

- **Tabs** — `php artisan flexi:add tabs`
  Uses `@flexilla/tabs`. Subcomponents: `x-ui.tabs.list`, `x-ui.tabs.trigger`, `x-ui.tabs.panel`

- **Pagination** — `php artisan flexi:add pagination`

- **Link** — `php artisan flexi:add link`

### Data & Feedback

- **Table** — `php artisan flexi:add table`
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.table.columns`, `x-ui.table.column`, `x-ui.table.rows`, `x-ui.table.row`, `x-ui.table.cell`

- **Avatar** — `php artisan flexi:add avatar`

- **Badge** — `php artisan flexi:add badge`

- **Alert** — `php artisan flexi:add alert`

- **Callout** — `php artisan flexi:add callout`
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.callout.title`, `x-ui.callout.description`

- **Progress** — `php artisan flexi:add progress`

- **Meter** — `php artisan flexi:add meter`

- **Skeleton** — `php artisan flexi:add skeleton`

- **Kbd** — `php artisan flexi:add kbd`

### Overlays & Disclosure

- **Modal** — `php artisan flexi:add modal`
  Uses `@flexilla/modal`. Props: `id` (required), `backdropClass`, `overlayBlured`, `closable`, `staticBackdrop`, `scrollableBody`
  Content props: `size` (xs|sm|md|lg|xl|2xl|3xl|4xl|full), `closable`, `noGutter`, `enterAnimation`, `exitAnimation`, `noAnimation`
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.modal.trigger`, `x-ui.modal.content`, `x-ui.modal.header`, `x-ui.modal.title`, `x-ui.modal.body`, `x-ui.modal.footer`, `x-ui.modal.close`
  Events: `modal:{id}:open`, `modal:{id}:close`

- **Alert Dialog** — `php artisan flexi:add alert-dialog`
  Confirmation dialog built on modal behavior

- **Slideover** — `php artisan flexi:add slideover`
  Uses `@flexilla/offcanvas`. Side-panel overlay.
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.slideover.trigger`, `x-ui.slideover.content`, `x-ui.slideover.header`, `x-ui.slideover.title`, `x-ui.slideover.body`, `x-ui.slideover.footer`, `x-ui.slideover.close`

- **Dropdown** — `php artisan flexi:add dropdown`
  Uses `@flexilla/dropdown`.
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.dropdown.trigger`, `x-ui.dropdown.item`, `x-ui.dropdown.label`, `x-ui.dropdown.separator`, `x-ui.dropdown.header`, `x-ui.dropdown.kbd`

- **Popover** — `php artisan flexi:add popover`
  Uses `@flexilla/popover`. Subcomponents: `x-ui.popover.trigger`

- **Tooltip** — `php artisan flexi:add tooltip`
  Uses `@flexilla/tooltip`. Subcomponents: `x-ui.tooltip.trigger`

- **Accordion** — `php artisan flexi:add accordion`
  Uses `@flexilla/accordion`.
  Subcomponents: `x-ui.accordion.item`, `x-ui.accordion.trigger`, `x-ui.accordion.content`, `x-ui.accordion.indicator`

- **Collapse** — `php artisan flexi:add collapse`
  Uses `@flexilla/collapse`. Subcomponents: `x-ui.collapse.trigger`, `x-ui.collapse.indicator`

## Documentation

- Docs: `/docs`
- Components: `/components`
- Source: `resources/views/content/docs/` and `resources/views/content/components/`
- Sidebar config: `config/sidebar.php`

## Links

- Homepage: https://flexiwind.laravel.com
- GitHub CLI: https://github.com/unoforge/flexiwind-cli
- Flexilla docs: https://flexilla-docs.vercel.app/
- Author: Johnkat MJ (https://x.com/johnkat_Mj)
